title: Spermacoce centranthoides
taxonomy: Spermacoce centranthoides is classified in the family Rubiaceae. This family comprises approximately 650 genera and 13,000 species of flowering plants. Spermacoce centranthoides itself is a species within the genus Spermacoce, which is a group of flowering plants native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The Rubiaceae family is often referred to as the madder family due to its large number of species with distinctive flowers and leaves. Spermacoce centranthoides is a member of the order Gentianales.

intro: Spermacoce centranthoides, also known as Centranthium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties that may aid in treating various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues.
